# Geotecnia1 — Antofagasta

> Geotechnical engineering services in Antofagasta, Chile.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Anclajes](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/anclajes/)
- [Calicatas](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/calicatas/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/cimentaciones/)
- [Columnas Grava](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/columnas-grava/)
- [Densidad Cono Arena](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/densidad-cono-arena/)

- [Ensayos Proctor](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/ensayos-proctor/)

- [Limites Atterberg](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/limites-atterberg/)
- [Losas Fundacion](https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/losas-fundacion/)

## Contact
- Website: https://antofagasta.geotecnia1.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Antofagasta, Chile.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
